# prisma-rs

> Pure Rust implementation of the Prisma ORM. Drop-in replacement for the
> TypeScript Prisma implementation: same schema input, same client API,
> same query results, same migration workflow.

Source: https://github.com/Shuozeli/prisma-rs

## What This Is

A from-scratch Rust implementation of the Prisma ORM that replaces the
TypeScript query execution layer, client runtime, CLI, code generators,
and database driver adapters. Designed for native server environments
with direct database connections.

Use cases:
- Type-safe database access from Rust applications
- Schema-driven code generation (Rust and TypeScript clients)
- Database migrations (dev, deploy, reset, resolve)
- Cross-database support (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, DuckDB)

## Architecture

Sixteen crates in a Cargo workspace:

### driver-core

Database driver trait and common types. Defines `DatabaseDriver` trait,
`ResultSet`, `DriverError`, `MappedError`, and value types (`PrismaValue`).
All database drivers implement this trait.

### driver-pg

PostgreSQL driver using `tokio-postgres` with `deadpool-postgres` connection
pooling. Handles type conversion between PostgreSQL wire types and
`PrismaValue`. Supports TLS via `rustls`.

### driver-mysql

MySQL driver using `mysql_async`. Handles MySQL-specific type mapping
including DATETIME, DECIMAL, JSON, and enum types.

### driver-sqlite

SQLite driver using `rusqlite` with bundled SQLite. Handles SQLite's
dynamic typing system and maps to `PrismaValue`.

### driver-duckdb

DuckDB driver built on the ADBC (Arrow Database Connectivity) layer.
Provides analytical database support.

### driver-adbc

Arrow Database Connectivity driver. Converts between Arrow columnar
format and Prisma's row-based `ResultSet`. Handles Arrow type mapping
for timestamps, decimals, lists, and nested structs.

### driver-flightsql

Arrow Flight SQL driver for remote database access over gRPC.

### prisma-schema

Schema types mirroring the Prisma schema AST. Defines `DataModel`,
`Model`, `Field`, `Relation`, `Enum`, and related types used by
the compiler and code generator.

### prisma-compiler

Query planning and compilation. Takes Prisma Client operations and
compiles them into query plans that the executor can run.

### prisma-migrate

Migration engine providing an RPC bridge to the Prisma schema engine.
Handles migrate dev, deploy, reset, resolve, and diff operations.
Defines RPC types: `MigrationList`, `MigrationDirectory`, `SchemaPush`.

### prisma-error

Shared error types used across crates. Defines `PrismaError` and
error categories for schema, query, migration, and driver errors.

### cross-compat

Cross-compatibility testing framework. Runs the same queries through
both the Rust and TypeScript Prisma implementations and asserts
identical results against real databases.

### query-executor

In-memory query execution engine. Implements filtering (where clauses),
sorting (orderBy), pagination (skip/take/cursor), aggregation (count,
sum, avg, min, max, groupBy), and relation traversal (include/select).
Also handles create, update, upsert, and delete mutations.

### prisma-client

Client runtime providing the high-level API. Includes Prisma Accelerate
integration (HTTP-based query forwarding) and interactive transaction
support.

### prisma-codegen

Client code generation from Prisma schemas. Builds a schema IR
(intermediate representation) and generates typed client code.
Validates identifiers and field types during generation.

### prisma-cli

CLI binary providing all Prisma CLI commands: generate, validate, format,
db push, db pull, db execute, migrate dev, migrate deploy, migrate reset,
migrate resolve, migrate diff. Handles configuration loading, database
URL validation, and migration file management.

## Key Types

- `DatabaseDriver` (driver-core): Async trait for database operations
  (execute, query, start_transaction)
- `ResultSet` (driver-core): Query result with column names and typed rows
- `PrismaValue` (driver-core): Enum of all supported value types
  (String, Int, Float, Boolean, DateTime, Json, Bytes, Null, etc.)
- `DriverError` (driver-core): Error with mapped variant for
  constraint violations, auth failures, connection issues
- `DataModel` (prisma-schema): Complete schema representation
- `QueryPlan` (prisma-compiler): Compiled query ready for execution

## Dependencies

Core: tokio, async-trait, thiserror, serde, serde_json, chrono, uuid
PostgreSQL: tokio-postgres, deadpool-postgres, rustls
MySQL: mysql_async
SQLite: rusqlite (bundled)
HTTP: reqwest (for Accelerate)
